summary: Backend API testing completed for mobile app integration. All 26 tests pass. Photo Game, Minting, and Marketplace APIs are working correctly for mobile app consumption.

minor.issue: Photo marketplace routes (marketplace_routes.py) are partially shadowed by general marketplace routes (server.py). The /api/marketplace/listings endpoint returns general marketplace listings instead of photo marketplace listings. Mobile API's getListing() uses singular '/listing/' path which hits photo marketplace, but getListings() uses '/listings' which hits general marketplace.

passed_tests: Photo Game: /api/photo-game/config returns correct configuration (max_stamina=100, stamina_per_battle=4)
Photo Game: /api/photo-game/stats returns user game stats (authenticated)
critical_code_review_comments: Route Conflict: Two marketplace routers exist - server.py (general marketplace) and marketplace_routes.py (photo marketplace). Both use /marketplace prefix. The general marketplace routes take precedence for /listings endpoint. Consider renaming photo marketplace to /photo-marketplace or consolidating the routes.

Mobile API Mismatch: mobile/src/services/api.js photoMarketplaceAPI.getListing() uses '/marketplace/listing/{id}' (singular) which correctly hits photo marketplace, but getListings() uses '/marketplace/listings' which hits general marketplace instead of photo marketplace.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile API endpoints for Photo Game Arena, Minted Photos, and Photo Marketplace are working. Key findings: 1) Photo Game config/stats/PvP/leaderboards all working, 2) Minting config/status/photos/feed all working, 3) Marketplace config/listings/stats/offers/sales all working. Note: There's a route conflict between general marketplace (server.py) and photo marketplace (marketplace_routes.py) - both use /marketplace prefix. The mobile app may need to use different endpoints for photo-specific marketplace features.
